ab: Ciwa, nusa ku alang qmita tama rudan mu.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: Bsiyaq nami balay ini pqqita da, lnglungun mu balay ka hiya.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: Qmita knan ka tama rudan, kiya ka qdalan ku na sika, pmahun ku na ocya.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃西瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to eat watermelon and drink tea.

ab: Chiya balay eqan ka sika hnuma tama rudan, balay bay malu uqun.
ch: 爺爺種的西瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The watermelon grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: Smkuxul ku ocya tama rudan uri, malu bay mahun uri.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: Cka hidaw cida hay, msupu ku bubu rudan pchada equn cka hidaw.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: Ou balay pnchada na equn cka hidaw ka bubu rudan, niqan qcurux, niqan rodux, niqan bawan mi niqan pngucul uri.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有蝸牛。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and snails.

ab: Babaw mnekan nami equn cka hidaw daw, musa nami smqic sama pnhuma dungan.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們又去菜園砍菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: Mangal ou bay bunga, sari mi qucun sbuway na knan ka bubu rudan, spadas ku na miyah sapah.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: Smwayay ku dhiya ka yaku, rngaun mu miyah ku qmita dhiya babaw dungan.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
